2606.21803.title: Test-Time Training with Next-Token Prediction
2606.21803.paper_summary: Next-token prediction is the self-supervised signal that trains language models, and every observed prompt token provides the same signal at test time. We study whether this signal can define the inner-loop objective for test-time training (TTT) in pretrained long-context language models. Many TTT architectures require models to be trained with test-time adaptation in mind, limiting their direct applicability to released LLM checkpoints. While recent in-place TTT methods make fast-weight adaptation possible for pretrained LLMs without redesigning the backbone, they leave a central question unresolved: what should each test-time write store? Existing recipes train the fast weight to match a learned local value proxy but they are not directly tied to the self-supervised next-token prediction signal. We introduce Test-Time Training with Next-Token Prediction (TTT-NTP), a drop-in fast-weight adaptation method for pretrained LLMs that instead supervises updates using the model's own next contextual hidden state. This makes each local write follow the same causal computation that supports next-token prediction: the value target is a pointwise linear projection of a single next-position contextual state. On RULER Full-13 (averaged over 4k, 8k, 16k, and 32k context lengths), TTT-NTP is the only method that consistently improves the released backbone across four models spanning three families and a 0.6--8B size range: Llama-3.1-8B (+3.9), Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.0), and the Qwen3 series (Qwen3-4B +4.1, Qwen3-0.6B +2.9). On the real-world LongBench-v2 long-document QA benchmark, TTT-NTP improves over the base model on both Llama-3.1-8B (+5.6) and Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.7), while preserving commonsense and knowledge performance.
2606.21803.paper_summary_zh: 下一個標記的預測是訓練語言模型的自我監督信號，每個觀察到的提示標記在測試時提供相同的信號。我們研究這個信號是否可以定義預訓練長上下文語言模型的測試時訓練（TTT）內部目標。許多TTT架構要求模型在考慮測試時適應的情況下進行訓練，這限制了它們對已發布的LLM檢查點的直接適用性。雖然最近的就地TTT方法使得預訓練LLM的快速權重適應成為可能，而無需重新設計骨幹，但它們留下了一個核心問題未解決：每個測試時寫入存儲應該儲存什麼？現有的配方訓練快速權重以匹配學習到的局部值代理，但它們並未直接與自我監督的下一個標記預測信號相關聯。我們介紹了使用下一個標記預測的測試時訓練（TTT-NTP），這是一種針對預訓練LLM的快速權重適應方法，該方法使用模型自身的下一個上下文隱藏狀態來監督更新。這使得每個局部寫入遵循支持下一個標記預測的相同因果計算：值目標是一個單一下一位置上下文狀態的逐點線性投影。在RULER Full-13（在4k、8k、16k和32k上下文長度上平均）上，TTT-NTP是唯一一個在跨越三個家族和0.6--8B大小範圍的四個模型中持續改善已發布骨幹的方法：Llama-3.1-8B (+3.9)、Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.0)和Qwen3系列（Qwen3-4B +4.1，Qwen3-0.6B +2.9）。在現實世界的LongBench-v2長文檔QA基準上，TTT-NTP在Llama-3.1-8B (+5.6)和Mistral-7B-v0.3 (+3.7)上均優於基礎模型，同時保留了常識和知識性能。
2606.21803.author: Xuan Ouyang et.al.
2606.21803.authors: Xuan Ouyang, Zefan Cai, Junjie Hu
